description: After planting, a farmer wants to verify that their planter correctly executed the variable rate seeding prescription.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the variable rate seeding prescription map that was sent to the planter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the original prescription map.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the as-applied map from the planter's controller, which shows the actual seeding rates applied.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the map of the actual rates.

nodes.task_description: Compare the prescription map to the as-applied map to identify any significant deviations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a difference map and confirms that the planter applied the rates with over 98% accuracy.
